response.justification: Candidate is a capable full-stack engineer with strong web/backend credentials in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5+ years building large-scale distributed compute infrastructure. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, and there is no evidence of cloud compute platform architecture, technical leadership of cloud/DevOps teams, or distributed systems at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps
Demonstrated mentoring and teaching ability through workshops, dojos, and courses
Founder-level ownership of an open-source geo-data platform deployed on Kubernetes
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only brief C/C++ work at National Instruments in 2014-2015
No demonstrated experience leading internal cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed infrastructure
Title is Senior/Staff IC; lacks the 2+ years of formal technical leadership over cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: No large-scale cloud compute platform background
